languages.text: {n}Едва вы произносите эти слова, как около ложа Патента из изумрудно-зеленого света сплетается знакомая фигура, а в голове начинает звучать голос, полный насмешки.{/n} "Какая наглядная демонстрация разницы между нами. Для вас реликвия, насчитывающая столетия — покрытый пылью хлам, оставленный без внимания в жалкой незащищенной каморке. Для меня каждый из моих экспонатов — драгоценный свидетель своего времени, бережно сохраненный в стазисе на тысячелетия вперед".

{n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the differences between us. To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."
languages.original_text: {n}Едва вы произносите эти слова, как около ложа Патента из изумрудно-зеленого света сплетается знакомая фигура, а в голове начинает звучать голос, полный насмешки.{/n} "Какая наглядная демонстрация разницы между нами. Для вас реликвия, насчитывающая столетия — покрытый пылью хлам, оставленный без внимания в жалкой незащищенной каморке. Для меня каждый из моих экспонатов — драгоценный свидетель своего времени, бережно сохраненный в стазисе на тысячелетия вперед".

traits.locale_text: {n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the difference between us. To you, a relic spanning centuries is nothing but dust-covered refuse, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured chamber. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its own era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its own era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but dust-covered junk, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but dust-covered junk, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

languages.text: {n}你话音刚落，一个熟悉的身影在幽绿色的光芒中凝聚成形，出现在贸易授状存放处的旁边。与此同时，你脑海中响起一个满是嘲弄的声音。{/n}“这真是完美体现了你我之间的差距。对你来说，一件数百年之久的圣物不过是块覆满灰尘的废料，被扔在可怜巴巴、毫无安保措施的储藏间里无人问津。而于我而言，我的每件展品都是其时代最珍贵的见证，被精心保存在静滞场中，传承千年。”
languages.original_text: {n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the differences between us. To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

traits.locale_text: {n}你话音刚落，一个熟悉的身影在幽绿色的光芒中凝聚成形，出现在贸易授状存放处的旁边。与此同时，你脑海中响起一个满是嘲弄的声音。{/n}“这真是完美体现了你我之间的差距。对你来说，一件数百年之久的圣物不过是块覆满灰尘的废料，被扔在可怜巴巴、毫无安保措施的储藏间里无人问津。而于我而言，我的每件展品都是其时代最珍贵的见证，被精心保存在静滞场中，传承千年。”

languages.text: {n}En cuanto terminas de hablar, una figura de luz verde esmeralda que te resulta familiar se materializa junto al lugar de descanso de la Patente, y una voz burlona resuena en tu cabeza.{/n} «Es una impactante demostración de nuestras diferencias. Para ti, una reliquia de hace siglos es chatarra polvorienta que queda desatendida en un almacén patético y desprotegido. Mientras, para mí cada una de mis exposiciones es un testigo de su era, conservado en suspensión durante los milenios venideros».
languages.original_text: {n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the differences between us. To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

traits.locale_text: {n}En cuanto terminas de hablar, una figura de luz verde esmeralda que te resulta familiar se materializa junto al lugar de descanso de la Patente, y una voz burlona resuena en tu cabeza.{/n} «Es una impactante demostración de nuestras diferencias. Para ti, una reliquia de hace siglos es chatarra polvorienta que queda desatendida en un almacén patético y desprotegido. Mientras, para mí cada una de mis exposiciones es un testigo de su era, conservado en suspensión durante los milenios venideros».

languages.text: {n}Au moment où vous prononcez ces mots, une silhouette familière apparaît dans la lumière vert émeraude près du lieu où reposait la lettre de marque, et une voix lourde de moquerie résonne dans votre esprit.{/n} « Un exemple frappant du fossé qui nous sépare. Pour vous, une relique datant de plusieurs siècles n'est qu'une babiole poussiéreuse qu'on abandonne sans surveillance dans une pathétique réserve ouverte à tous les vents. Pour moi, chaque pièce de l'exposition est un témoin précieux de son époque que je me dois de préserver avec le plus grand soin pour les millénaires à venir. »
languages.original_text: {n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the differences between us. To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

languages.text: {n}Bu kelimeleri söylediğin an, Ruhsatname'nin durduğu yerin yanında zümrüt yeşili ışıktan tanıdık bir figür birleşiyor ve zihninde alaycılık damlayan bir ses yankılanıyor.{/n} "Aramızdaki farkların ne kadar da çarpıcı bir göstergesi. Senin için asırlık bir yadigâr; acınası, korumasız bir depoda gözetimsiz bırakılmış, tozla kaplı bir hurda parçasından başka bir şey değil. Benim içinse her bir sergim; binlerce yıl boyunca stazda özenle korunmuş, kendi çağının değerli bir tanığıdır."
languages.original_text: {n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the differences between us. To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bu kelimeleri söylediğin an, Ruhsatname'nin durduğu yerin yanında zümrüt yeşili ışıktan tanıdık bir figür birleşiyor ve zihninde alaycılık damlayan bir ses yankılanıyor.{/n} "Aramızdaki farkların ne kadar da çarpıcı bir göstergesi. Senin için asırlık bir yadigâr; acınası, korumasız bir depoda gözetimsiz bırakılmış, tozla kaplı bir hurda parçasından başka bir şey değil. Benim içinse her bir sergim; binlerce yıl boyunca stazda özenle korunmuş, kendi çağının değerli bir tanığıdır."

languages.text: {n}Als du diese Worte aussprichst, materialisiert sich neben der Ruhestätte des Handelsbriefs eine vertraute Gestalt aus smaragdgrünem Licht und in deinem Verstand ertönt eine spöttische Stimme.{/n} "Was für eine bemerkenswerte Demonstration unserer Unterschiedlichkeit. Für dich ist ein jahrhundertealtes Relikt nur verstaubter Trödel in einer armseligen, ungesicherten Abstellkammer. Für mich ist jedes meiner Exponate ein kostbarer Zeuge seiner Zeit, für die kommenden Jahrtausende sorgsam in Stase aufbewahrt."
languages.original_text: {n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the differences between us. To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

Für dich ist ein jahrhundertealtes Relikt nur verstaubter Trödel in einer armseligen, ungesicherten Abstellkammer. Für mich ist jedes meiner Exponate ein kostbarer Zeuge seiner Zeit, für die kommenden Jahrtausende sorgsam in Stase aufbewahrt."

languages.text: {n}この言葉を口にした瞬間、警備員の休憩場所の隣にエメラルドグリーンの光から、馴染みのある姿が形作られる。そして、嘲弄に満ちた声があなたの心に響く。{/n}「私たちの違いを、これほど鮮明に示すとは。あなたにとって、何世紀も前の遺物は、見捨てられた埃まみれの破片に過ぎない。一方、私の展示品は、その時代を証言する貴重な存在であり、何千年も未来へと、慎重に保存されているのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the differences between us. To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."

traits.locale_text: {n}この言葉を口にした瞬間、警備員の休憩場所の隣にエメラルドグリーンの光から、馴染みのある姿が形作られる。そして、嘲弄に満ちた声があなたの心に響く。{/n}「私たちの違いを、これほど鮮明に示すとは。あなたにとって、何世紀も前の遺物は、見捨てられた埃まみれの破片に過ぎない。一方、私の展示品は、その時代を証言する貴重な存在であり、何千年も未来へと、慎重に保存されているのだ。」
